items.title: Multimodal Retrieval with Better Negative Mining
items.abstract: We improve multimodal retrieval quality by hard negative mining and better curriculum.

items.title: Scalable Agentic Planning for Code Generation
items.abstract: Agentic planning improves long horizon code generation tasks in constrained contexts.

items.title: Efficient Attention Kernels for Inference
items.abstract: We design practical attention kernels and evaluate throughput gains in production.

items.title: Long Context Memory for LLM Agents
items.abstract: Memory compression and retrieval improve long context instruction fidelity in agents.
